title: Museum of Illusions Seattle
content: # EXPERIENCE THE IMPOSSIBLE Museum of Illusions® Seattle. It was a unique experience. We wanted to lie down on the floor (to pretend to hang off the side of the building), but it was quite dirty because everyone had been walking on it. Such a fun and interactive experience! Gavin in the front was very friendly and helpful, and the team overall spent and made time to ensure that puzzles were understood if needed or that experiences were cleaned up (a lot of them relied on clean glass or mirrors). Worth it especially if you are able to have the kids on under age 5 as the cost for entry can add up if the.kids don't appreciate it or rush through, so highly advise taking your time to explore each item and read all the walls and instructions!! Sign up for our newsletter and be the first to find out about special events, new promotions, and exciting happenings at Museum of Illusions®!

title: Is Seattle's Museum of Illusions Worth It? My Honest Review + Tips!
content: I found the gravity-defying rooms and playful installations exhilarating. It's interactive and makes you a part of the experience, which is rare
